coverage.summary: V1 bootstraps the ledger from active planner artifacts and the current Socratic workstream instead of attempting full repo-wide backfill.

object_kinds.label: Initiative
object_kinds.description: Planner-wide strategic thread or system-level improvement lane.

object_kinds.label: Workstream
object_kinds.description: A coherent product or implementation stream that owns multiple slices or follow-ons.

object_kinds.label: Slice
object_kinds.description: A bounded feature/spec slice that can move through deep-interview, planning, execution, and verification.

object_kinds.label: Plan
object_kinds.description: A PRD/test-spec or equivalent approved planning artifact.

object_kinds.label: Implementation
object_kinds.description: A realized code/documentation change set grounded in a plan.

object_kinds.label: Review
object_kinds.description: A review/report artifact that evaluates current state, drift, or readiness.

object_kinds.label: Deferred item
object_kinds.description: A still-live concern that is not yet in the active slice but must remain linked and visible.

object_kinds.label: Decision
object_kinds.description: A durable decision that constrains later planning or implementation.

object_kinds.label: Risk
object_kinds.description: An ongoing risk or tracking concern that needs visibility in the ledger.

object_kinds.label: Governance artifact
object_kinds.description: A root governance or control artifact that anchors planner-wide workflow, planning, or coordination.

routing_states.label: Needs $deep-interview
routing_states.description: Intent/boundary clarification is the next valid move.

routing_states.label: Ready for $ralplan
routing_states.description: Requirements are clear enough for consensus planning.

routing_states.label: Ready for $ralph
routing_states.description: An approved plan exists and execution can proceed.

routing_states.label: Needs testing
routing_states.description: Implementation exists but verification or regression proof is next.

routing_states.label: Needs analysis
routing_states.description: The concern is still too broad or cross-cutting and needs analysis before scoping.

routing_states.label: Monitoring / watch
routing_states.description: Keep visible, but do not advance immediately.

routing_states.label: Complete
routing_states.description: No next workflow step is currently required.

items.title: Planner project tracking library
items.summary: Planner-wide OMX-linked ledger initiative with root governance, converged cross-family truth, a cleaned linkage spine, repo-graph-coupled automation, an explicit freshness maintenance signal, and the review-remediation pass for automation convergence, dry-run proof, and planning/plugin truth now landed. Graph output remains evidence, not blueprint truth.
